name: Sourdough Pancakes or Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow the starter mixture to reach room temperature.
2. Stir well, remove and save one cup for future use.
3. Renew starter if necessary.
4. Mix starter, milk, and all-purpose flour, and allow to ferment, covered with saran wrap, for 12-24 hours.
5. Blend melted margarine and egg yolks.
6. Mix baking soda with baking powder and the whole wheat flour and rolled oats (or substitute all-purpose flour) and add to the margarine and egg yolks.
7. Stir into the starter mixture until blended.
8. Whip egg whites until stiff and stir into batter.
9. Thin batter with milk, if necessary, until thickness of heavy cream.
10. Cook saucer-sized pancakes on a hot (400°F) griddle.
11. Cook waffles at 375°F in waffle iron.
12. Servings is number of pancakes.
